Dham","id":"3519","category":"Unknown","url":"https:\/\/jiotvmblive.cdn.jio.com\/bpk-tv\/ShreeSalangpurDham_MOB\/WDVLive\/index.mpd","logo":"https:\/\/jiotv.catchup.cdn.jio.com\/dare_images\/images\/ShreeSalangpurDham.png"},{"name":"Journy","id":"3524","category":"Unknown","url":"https:\/\/jiotvmblive.cdn.jio.com\/bpk-tv\/amg02159c11\/HLSPartner\/index.m3u8","logo":"https:\/\/jiotv.catchup.cdn.jio.com\/dare_images\/images\/amg02159c11.png"},{"name":"Rashtriya Pahal","id":"3526","category":"Unknown","url":"https:\/\/jiotvmblive.cdn.jio.com\/bpk-tv\/RashtriyaPahal_MOB\/WDVLive\/index.mpd","logo":"https:\/\/jiotv.catchup.cdn.jio.com\/dare_images\/images\/RashtriyaPahal.png"},{"name":"Sony Liv Sports 4 Kannada","id":"3528","category":"Sports","url":"https:\/\/jiotvmblive.cdn.jio.com\/bpk-tv\/SonyLivSports4Kan_MOB\/WDVLive\/index.mpd","logo":"https:\/\/jiotv.catchup.cdn.jio.com\/dare_images\/images\/SonyLivSports4Kan.png"},{"name":"4 SiDES TV","id":"3529","category":"Unknown","url":"https:\/\/jiotvmblive.cdn.jio.com\/bpk-tv\/4sites\/HLSPartner\/index.m3u8","logo":"https:\/\/jiotv.catchup.cdn.jio.com\/dare_images\/images\/4sites.png"},{"name":"UIPM Pentathlon World Cup","id":"3530","category":"Sports","url":"https:\/\/jiotvmblive.cdn.jio.com\/bpk-tv\/UIPMPentathlonWC_MOB\/WDVLive\/index.mpd","logo":"https:\/\/jiotv.catchup.cdn.jio.com\/dare_images\/images\/UIPMPentathlonWC.png"}];
    
    (function(){
        // data
        let allChannels = SERVER_CHANNELS_DATA || [];
        let filtered = [];
        let bookmarks = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('allinone_bookmarks_final')) || [];
        let categories = ['All'];
        let activeCategory = 'All';
        let categoriesExpanded = false;
        let showingBookmarksOnly = false;
        let isIndianUser = false; // IP detection flag

        // dom
        const grid = document.getElementById('channelGrid');
        const catInner = document.getElementById('catInner');
        const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');
        const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('toggleCatsBtn');
        const toggleBtnText = document.getElementById('toggleBtnText');
        const modalOverlay = document.getElementById('modalOverlay');
        const modalChannelName = document.getElementById('modalChannelName');
        const worldLink = document.getElementById('worldLink');
        const indiaLink = document.getElementById('indiaLink');
        const closeModal = document.getElementById('closeModalBtn');
        const bookmarkHeaderBtn = document.getElementById('bookmarkHeaderBtn');
        const bookmarkCount = document.getElementById('bookmarkCount');

        // IP Detection function
        async function detectUserCountry() {
            try {
                const response = await fetch('https://ipapi.co/json/');
                const data = await response.json();
                isIndianUser = data.country === 'IN';
                
                // If Indian user, disable worldwide button in modal
                if (isIndianUser) {
                    worldLink.classList.add('disabled');
                    worldLink.removeAttribute('href');
                    worldLink.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.log('IP detection failed, assuming non-Indian');
                isIndianUser = false;
            }
        }

        // Use pre-fetched data from server instead of fetching again
        function initWithServerData() {
            if (allChannels && allChannels.length > 0) {
                extractCategories();
                updateBookmarkCount();
                filterAndRender();
                detectUserCountry();
            } else {
                grid.innerHTML = `<div class="empty-box">⚠️ No channel data available. Please try again later.</div>`;
            }
        }

        function extractCategories() {
            const catSet = new Set();
            allChannels.forEach(ch => { if (ch.category && ch.category.trim()) catSet.add(ch.category.trim()); });
            categories = ['All', ...Array.from(catSet).sort()];
        }

        // render categories
        function renderCategories() {
            let catsToRender = categoriesExpanded ? categories : categories.slice(0, 1);
            let html = '';
            catsToRender.forEach(cat => {
                html += `<span class="cat-chip ${activeCategory === cat ? 'active' : ''}" data-cat="${cat}">${cat}</span>`;
            });
            catInner.innerHTML = html;

            document.querySelectorAll('.cat-chip').forEach(chip => {
                chip.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    const cat = e.target.dataset.cat;
                    activeCategory = cat;
                    showingBookmarksOnly = false;
                    bookmarkHeaderBtn.classList.remove('active');
                    renderCategories();
                    filterAndRender();
                });
            });

            toggleBtnText.innerText = categoriesExpanded ? 'Show less' : 'Expand';
        }

        toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            categoriesExpanded = !categoriesExpanded;
            renderCategories();
        });

        // filter + search
        function filterAndRender() {
            let query = searchInput.value.trim().toLowerCase();
            let temp = [...allChannels];

            if (showingBookmarksOnly) {
                temp = temp.filter(ch => {
                    const chId = ch.id || ch.name;
                    return bookmarks.includes(chId);
                });
            } else {
                if (activeCategory !== 'All') {
                    temp = temp.filter(ch => ch.category === activeCategory);
                }
            }
            
            if (query) {
                temp = temp.filter(ch => ch.name?.toLowerCase().includes(query));
            }

            filtered = temp;
            renderGrid(filtered);
        }

        // render grid
        function renderGrid(channels) {
            const telegramObj = allChannels.find(ch => ch.name?.toLowerCase().includes('join telegram') || ch.telegram) || null;

            let html = '';

            // show telegram only if not in bookmark-only mode OR if telegram is bookmarked
            if (!showingBookmarksOnly || (telegramObj && bookmarks.includes(telegramObj.channel_id || telegramObj.name))) {
                if (telegramObj) {
                    html += renderTelegramCard(telegramObj);
                }
            }

            channels.forEach(ch => {
                if (telegramObj && (ch === telegramObj || ch.telegram === telegramObj.telegram)) return;
                html += renderCard(ch);
            });

            if (channels.length === 0 && !(telegramObj && !showingBookmarksOnly)) {
                html = '<div class="empty-box">📭 no channels</div>';
            }

            grid.innerHTML = html;

            // bookmark listeners
            document.querySelectorAll('.channel-card .bookmark-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    const id = btn.dataset.id;
                    toggleBookmark(id);
                });
            });

            // Telegram card click
            const telegramCard = document.querySelector('.telegram-card');
            if (telegramCard && telegramObj) {
                telegramCard.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    if (e.target.closest('.bookmark-btn')) return;
                    const telegramUrl = telegramObj.telegram || 'https://t.me/allinone_reborn';
                    window.open(telegramUrl, '_blank');
                });
            }

            // regular card click
            document.querySelectorAll('.channel-card:not(.telegram-card)').forEach(card => {
                card.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    if (e.target.closest('.bookmark-btn')) return;
                    const chId = card.dataset.channelId;
                    const chName = card.dataset.channelName;
                    openModal(chId, chName);
                });
            });
        }

        function toggleBookmark(id) {
            const index = bookmarks.indexOf(id);
            if (index === -1) {
                bookmarks.push(id);
            } else {
                bookmarks.splice(index, 1);
            }
            localStorage.setItem('allinone_bookmarks_final', JSON.stringify(bookmarks));
            
            updateBookmarkCount();
            
            if (showingBookmarksOnly) {
                filterAndRender();
            } else {
                document.querySelectorAll('.bookmark-btn').forEach(btn => {
                    if (btn.dataset.id === id) {
                        btn.classList.toggle('active');
                        const icon = btn.querySelector('i');
                        if (icon) {
                            icon.className = btn.classList.contains('active') ? 'fas fa-bookmark' : 'far fa-bookmark';
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
        }

        function renderTelegramCard(ch) {
            const channelId = ch.id || ch.name || 'telegram';
            const bookmarked = bookmarks.includes(channelId);
            const logo = ch.logo || 'https://i.ibb.co/N2yz4PkY/1738743366692.png';

            return `
                <div class="channel-card telegram-card" data-channel-id="${channelId}" data-channel-name="${ch.name || 'Telegram'}">
                    <div class="bookmark-btn ${bookmarked ? 'active' : ''}" data-id="${channelId}"><i class="fa-${bookmarked ? 'solid' : 'regular'} fa-bookmark"></i></div>
                    <div class="card-logo"><img src="${logo}" alt="telegram" loading="lazy"></div>
                    <div class="card-name">${ch.name || 'Join Telegram'}</div>
                    <div class="card-badge-row">
                        <span class="cat-mini">🔗 Telegram</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        function renderCard(ch) {
            const hasHD = ch.mpd && (ch.mpd.includes('HD') || ch.mpd.includes('hd') || ch.mpd.includes('1080') || ch.mpd.includes('720'));
            const channelId = ch.id || ch.name || 'unknown';
            const bookmarked = bookmarks.includes(channelId);
            const logo = ch.logo || 'https://via.placeholder.com/100x100?text=📺';
            const category = ch.category || '';

            return `
                <div class="channel-card" data-channel-id="${channelId}" data-channel-name="${ch.name || 'Channel'}">
                    <div class="bookmark-btn ${bookmarked ? 'active' : ''}" data-id="${channelId}"><i class="fa-${bookmarked ? 'solid' : 'regular'} fa-bookmark"></i></div>
                    <div class="card-logo"><img src="${logo}" alt="logo" loading="lazy"></div>
                    <div class="card-name">${ch.name || 'channel'}</div>
                    <div class="card-badge-row">
                        ${hasHD ? '<span class="hd-badge">HD</span>' : ''}
                        ${category ? '<span class="cat-mini">' + category.slice(0,12) + '</span>' : ''}
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        function updateBookmarkCount() {
            bookmarkCount.textContent = bookmarks.length;
        }

        // header bookmark button
        bookmarkHeaderBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (bookmarks.length === 0) {
                alert('No bookmarks yet! Click the bookmark icon on any channel to add.');
                return;
            }
            
            showingBookmarksOnly = !showingBookmarksOnly;
            
            if (showingBookmarksOnly) {
                bookmarkHeaderBtn.classList.add('active');
                activeCategory = 'All';
            } else {
                bookmarkHeaderBtn.classList.remove('active');
            }
            
            renderCategories();
            filterAndRender();
        });

        // modal
        function openModal(chId, chName) {
            modalChannelName.innerText = chName;
            const channel = allChannels.find(c => (c.id === chId) || (c.name === chId));
            const idForPlayer = channel?.id || chId;

            worldLink.href = `https://allinonereborn.online/jtvweb/ww/pworld.php?id=${encodeURIComponent(idForPlayer)}`;
            indiaLink.href = `https://allinonereborn.online/jtvweb/pind.php?id=${encodeURIComponent(idForPlayer)}`;

            // Re-check IP and disable if Indian
            if (isIndianUser) {
                worldLink.classList.add('disabled');
                worldLink.removeAttribute('href');
                worldLink.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
            } else {
                worldLink.classList.remove('disabled');
                worldLink.href = `https://allinonereborn.online/jtvweb/ww/pworld.php?id=${encodeURIComponent(idForPlayer)}`;
                worldLink.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
            }

            modalOverlay.classList.add('show');
        }

        closeModal.addEventListener('click', ()=> modalOverlay.classList.remove('show'));
        modalOverlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if(e.target === modalOverlay) modalOverlay.classList.remove('show'); });

        // search
        let searchTimer;
        searchInput.addEventListener('input', ()=> {
            clearTimeout(searchTimer);
            searchTimer = setTimeout(() => filterAndRender(), 200);
        });

        // Initialize with server data (no external fetch needed)
        initWithServerData();
    })();
</script>
    
    <!-- Anti-Adblock Popup -->
<div class="adb" id="adb" style="display: none;">
  <div class="adbs">
    <h3>Adblock/Brave Shields Detected</h3>
    <p>Please disable your adblocker or Brave Shields to continue browsing this site.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
.adb {
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
  z-index: 99999;
  display: none;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.adbs {
  background: #fff;
  padding: 30px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 5px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
  text-align: center;
  max-width: 400px;
  width: 90%;
}
@keyframes glow {
  from { text-shadow: 0 0 0px #ff0000; }
  to { text-shadow: 0 0 1px #ff0000; }
}
.adbs h3 {
  color: #d00;
  font-size: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}
.adbs p {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: #333;
}
</style>

<script>
// ----------------- Popup Function -----------------
function showPopup(reason = "Adblock Detected") {
  document.getElementById("adb").style.display = "flex";
  document.querySelector("#adb .adbs h3").innerText = reason;

  if (reason.includes("Brave")) {
  document.querySelector("#adb .adbs p").innerHTML = `
    Please disable Brave Shields (click Brave logo → toggle Shields off) to continue browsing.<br>
    <span style="
      color: #ff0000;
      font-weight: bold;
      animation: glow 1s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    ">
      If still showing message after disabling please reload page
    </span>
  `;
}
  console.warn("⚠️ Popup Triggered:", reason);
}

// ----------------- PC Browser Adblock Detection -----------------
async function detectAdblock() {
  let detected = false;

  // bait div
  const bait = document.createElement("div");
  bait.className = "ad adsbox ad-banner adsense ad-container sponsored";
  bait.style.cssText = "width:1px;height:1px;position:absolute;left:-9999px;top:-9999px;";
  document.body.appendChild(bait);

  // bait img
  const img = document.createElement("img");
  img.src = "https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/imgad?id=CAASFeDxyz";
  img.style.cssText = "width:1px;height:1px;position:absolute;left:-9999px;top:-9999px;";
  img.onerror = () => { detected = true; };
  document.body.appendChild(img);

  // bait iframe
  const iframe = document.createElement("iframe");
  iframe.src = "https://googleads.g.doubleclick.net/pagead/html/r2023/sample-ad.html";
  iframe.style.cssText = "width:1px;height:1px;position:absolute;left:-9999px;top:-9999px;";
  iframe.onerror = () => { detected = true; };
  document.body.appendChild(iframe);

  // bait script
  const script = document.createElement("script");
  script.src = "https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js";
  script.async = true;
  script.onerror = () => { detected = true; };
  document.head.appendChild(script);

  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));

  if (
    window.getComputedStyle(bait).display === "none" ||
    bait.offsetHeight === 0 ||
    bait.offsetParent === null
  ) {
    detected = true;
  }

  bait.remove();
  img.remove();
  iframe.remove();
  script.remove();

  return detected;
}

// ----------------- Brave Shields Detection -----------------
async function detectBraveShields() {
  try {
    let res = await fetch("https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js", {
      method: "GET",
      cache: "no-store",
      mode: "no-cors"
    });

    if (res.type === "opaque") {
      try {
        const buf = await res.clone().arrayBuffer();
        console.log("🟡 Brave Response Size:", buf.byteLength);

        // Corrected Logic:
        // Size < 100 = Shields OFF
        // Size >= 100 = Shields ON
        if (buf.byteLength < 100) {
          return false; // Shields OFF
        } else {
          return true;  // Shields ON
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn("🟡 Brave fetch blocked", e);
        return true; // Shields ON
      }
    }
    return true; // default treat as ON
  } catch (e) {
    console.error("🛑 Brave Shields hard blocked", e);
    return true; // Shields ON
  }
}

// ----------------- Main -----------------
window.addEventListener("load", async () => {
  const shieldsOn = await detectBraveShields();
  if (shieldsOn) {
    showPopup("Brave Shields Detected");
    return;
  }

  const adblocker = await detectAdblock();
  if (adblocker) {
    showPopup("Adblock Detected");
  }
});
</script>
